case_title: TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION VS. MPR HEALTH SYSTEMS, INC. et al

DECLARATION OF ERNEST I. KNOWLES RE: DEFAULT & REQUEST FOR JUDGMENT BY COURT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION AFTER DEFAULT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION
